text: A request to the developer. Very efficient app with prompt service. however would like to give a feedback to the developer of this app. Lately, I have encountered experiences from several delivery boys that they were unable to locate the address in spite of updating the address in our profile as accurately as possible. so why not provide a text field that enables to input live location link so that it will be easier to share the same with them when they are trying to deliver our orders. That way it will be less cumbersome for the delivery boys to locate the customers address and less stressful when having the orders delivered.

text:
Important: Verify the Weight of Meat Ordered Online. Just a heads-up for everyone ordering chicken from Blinkit.

Today I ordered a 450 g pack of Godrej boneless chicken. I usually don’t check the weight, but this time I was making a recipe that required exactly 450 g, so I placed it on my kitchen weighing scale.

To my surprise, the pack weighed only 380 g, not 450 g.

I contacted Blinkit, and they promptly refunded me for the shortfall, which I appreciate. However, that’s not really the point. Most customers don’t weigh their groceries every time they receive an order, so discrepancies like this can easily go unnoticed.

My suggestion to everyone is to check the weight of chicken, fish, or any other items sold by weight whenever possible. Hopefully, this was just an isolated packing error, but it’s worth being aware of.

text:
Worst Quality Products & Helpless Customer Support. Very disappointed with Blinkit. I received a poor-quality item that was old, not fresh, and frozen into a solid block like a stone, making it impossible to use or cook properly. This is completely unacceptable for a grocery delivery service.

What made the experience even worse was the customer support. The support team was unhelpful, took no responsibility, and did not provide a satisfactory resolution. It felt like they were not interested in solving the customer’s problem.

I expected fresh products and reliable service, but instead I received poor-quality items and disappointing support. I have lost trust in Blinkit and will think twice before ordering again.

text: We should support. I truly appreciate the incredible work Blinkit is doing for society. Providing ambulance services at such a low cost is a remarkable initiative that can help countless people during emergencies. This is more than just a business service—it is a meaningful contribution to the community and a great example of social responsibility. Fast delivery, reliable support, and now affordable emergency assistance show how much they care about people’s well-being. A big thank you to the entire Blinkit team for making essential services more accessible and helping those in need.

author: Agila Anil

text:
Today, I witnessed something truly inspiring. A Blinkit ambulance arrived quickly during a medical emergency and provided its service completely free of cost. Seeing such a fast and compassionate response reminded me how important every minute is when someone’s life is at risk.

A heartfelt thank you to the entire Blinkit team for taking this initiative. Providing emergency ambulance services without charging patients is a remarkable step toward making healthcare more accessible and saving lives. Acts like these show that businesses can create a real, positive impact on society.

Thank you, Blinkit, for putting people first. Wishing your team continued success in this life-saving mission.
author: Avishkar.k

text: Blinkit
author: Oandbdn

text:
Pathetic. Very disappointing experience with Blinkit.

Their customer support is one of the worst I’ve dealt with. Instead of resolving genuine issues, they simply reject complaints without providing a satisfactory solution.

Most products are sold at MRP, so there are hardly any meaningful discounts. On top of that, they charge a handling fee, and you often have to place a large order just to qualify for free delivery.

The biggest disappointment is their after-sales service. Even when a defective or damaged product is delivered, getting a return or refund is extremely difficult.

Based on my experience, the convenience is not worth the poor customer service.

text:
Worst customer support experience!!. Despite acknowledging that there was an issue with the product purchased through Blinkit, the support team took no ownership or accountability for resolving it. Every response was the same: "Our system doesn't allow it," "We're bound by policy," or "Please contact the brand."

I requested a refund or an exchange for another brand, but both were denied without any meaningful effort to help. Customer service should focus on resolving genuine issues, not repeatedly citing policies and system limitations.

My issue remains unresolved, and I'm extremely disappointed with the lack of customer-centric support.
